visual.name: kpi_matrix
visual.description: Matrix of Cards/Tiles with Indicator, Minichart, Heatmap

ar-SA.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: بدون ترخيص، تقتصر المصفوفة على بطاقتين (2×1).
ar-SA.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: إعدادات ترخيص KPI Matrix Premium Flat لإزالة قيود النسخة المجانية في بيئات Power BI التي لا تدعم الترخيص لكل مستخدم (مثل Power BI Embedded وReporting Server)

Bitte weisen Sie einen Ist-Wert zu...
de-DE.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Ohne Lizenz ist die Matrix auf 2x1 Karten begrenzt.
de-DE.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Lizenzeinstellungen für KPI Matrix Premium Flat, um Einschränkungen der kostenlosen Version in Power BI-Umgebungen zu entfernen, die keine Pro-Benutzerlizenzierung unterstützen (z.B. Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

es-ES.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Sin licencia, la matriz está limitada a 2×1 tarjetas.
es-ES.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Configuración de licencia para KPI Matrix Premium Flat para eliminar las limitaciones de la versión gratuita en entornos de Power BI que no admiten licencias por usuario (p. ej., Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

es-MX.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Sin licencia, la matriz está limitada a tarjetas 2×1.
es-MX.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Configuración de licencia para KPI Matrix Premium Flat para eliminar las limitaciones de la versión gratuita en entornos Power BI que no admiten licencias por usuario (p. ej., Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

fr-CA.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Sans licence, la matrice est limitée à 2×1 cartes.
fr-CA.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Paramètres de licence KPI Matrix Premium Flat pour retirer les limites de la version gratuite dans les environnements Power BI ne prenant pas en charge les licences par utilisateur (p. ex. Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

fr-FR.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Sans licence, la matrice est limitée à 2×1 cartes.
fr-FR.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Paramètres de licence pour KPI Matrix Premium Flat afin de supprimer les limitations de la version gratuite dans les environnements Power BI ne prenant pas en charge les licences par utilisateur (ex. Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

it-IT.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Senza licenza, la matrice è limitata a 2×1 carte.
it-IT.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Impostazioni di licenza per KPI Matrix Premium Flat per rimuovere le limitazioni della versione gratuita negli ambienti Power BI che non supportano la licenza per utente (es. Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

ja-JP.Indicator style: インジケータースタイル
実績値を割り当ててください...
ja-JP.Conditional background measure: ヒートマップ用メジャー
ja-JP.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: ライセンスがない場合、マトリックスは 2×1 カードに制限されます。
ja-JP.License KPI Matrix Premium Flat: KPI Matrix Premium Flat ライセンス
ja-JP.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Power BI Embedded や Reporting Server など、ユーザー単位のライセンスをサポートしない環境で無料版の制限を解除するための KPI Matrix Premium Flat ライセンス設定
ライセンスを確認しています...

ja-JP.Individual target suffix: 個別目標サフィックス
ja-JP.Individual delta suffix: 個別差分サフィックス

ko-KR.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: 사용자 기반 라이선스를 지원하지 않는 Power BI 환경(예: Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)에서 무료 버전의 제한을 제거하기 위한 KPI Matrix Premium Flat 라이선스 설정

pl-PL.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Bez licencji macierz jest ograniczona do kart 2×1.
pl-PL.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Ustawienia licencji KPI Matrix Premium Flat w celu usunięcia ograniczeń wersji darmowej w środowiskach Power BI bez licencjonowania per‑użytkownik (np. Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

pt-BR.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Sem licença, a matriz é limitada a cartões 2×1.
pt-BR.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Configurações de licença do KPI Matrix Premium Flat para remover limitações da versão gratuita em ambientes Power BI que não suportam licenciamento por usuário (ex.: Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

pt-PT.Actual font: Tipo de letra do valor real
pt-PT.Target font: Tipo de letra do valor alvo
pt-PT.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Sem licença, a matriz está limitada a cartões 2×1.
pt-PT.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Definições de licença para KPI Matrix Premium Flat para remover limitações da versão gratuita em ambientes Power BI que não suportam licenciamento por utilizador (ex.: Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server)

tr-TR.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: Lisans olmadan matris 2×1 kart ile sınırlıdır.
tr-TR.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: Kullanıcı başına lisanslamayı desteklemeyen Power BI ortamlarında (ör. Power BI Embedded, Reporting Server) ücretsiz sürüm kısıtlamalarını kaldırmak için KPI Matrix Premium Flat lisans ayarları

zh-CN.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: 无许可证时，矩阵限制为 2×1 卡片。
zh-CN.License KPI Matrix Premium Flat: KPI Matrix Premium Flat 许可证
zh-CN.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: 用于在不支持按用户许可的 Power BI 环境（如 Power BI Embedded、Reporting Server）中移除免费版限制的 KPI Matrix Premium Flat 许可证设置

zh-HK.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: 未授權時，矩陣僅限 2×1 卡片。
zh-HK.License KPI Matrix Premium Flat: KPI Matrix Premium Flat 授權
zh-HK.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: 在不支援每用戶授權的 Power BI 環境（如 Power BI Embedded、Reporting Server）中，用於移除免費版限制的 KPI Matrix Premium Flat 授權設定

zh-TW.Without license matrix is limited to 2x1: 未授權時，矩陣僅限 2×1 卡片。
zh-TW.License KPI Matrix Premium Flat: KPI Matrix Premium Flat 授權
zh-TW.License settings for KPI Matrix Premium: 在不支援每位使用者授權的 Power BI 環境（如 Power BI Embedded、Reporting Server）中，用於移除免費版限制的 KPI Matrix Premium Flat 授權設定
